Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $62,950,384Details
International Box Office $29,728,564
Worldwide Box Office $92,678,948
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $39,056,172
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,800,299
Total $41,856,471
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,007,426 (25.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,673 opening theaters/2,794 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,422,884

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 31st, 2010 (Wide) by Walt Disney
Video Release: August 17th, 2010 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic material, some violence, sensuality and mild language.
Running Time: 107 minutes
Plot point: Coming of Age, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Touchstone Pictures, Offspring Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
